description_long: This is a young, medium-sized dog with a short, smooth coat that is primarily light beige with subtle darker shading along the back, ears, and tail. The dog has a well-proportioned, athletic build with a straight back, long legs, and a slightly tapered tail held horizontally. Its head is broad with a short muzzle, dark nose, and expressive, dark eyes. The ears are floppy and hang down close to the sides of the head. The paws are rounded and sturdy, suitable for walking or running on various urban surfaces. There is no visible collar or leash, and the dog appears alert and healthy, typical of a Labrador Retriever puppy.
description: A light beige, short-haired, floppy-eared dog with a straight back and horizontal tail, resembling a Labrador Retriever puppy. The dog has a smooth coat, dark eyes, and a sturdy, athletic build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dog's straight back, horizontal tail, and floppy ears, with clear beige and light brown shading.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the dog's tail held straight out, muscular hind legs, and the darker shading along the spine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the dog's profile, floppy ears, and smooth coat coloration.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the dog's broad head, dark eyes, short muzzle, and both floppy ears hanging down.
